_note: Undated batch u3: married-in spouses given their DOCUMENTED parents + full siblings. 30 of 46 filled; 16 skipped as undocumented/legendary/disputed (see report). New parents/siblings carry the SPI_ prefix. Existing ids referenced (not duplicated): CLEOPATRA3, EDMWOOD, JOANBEAUSCOT+JB(existing full brother John Beaufort 1st Duke of Somerset), JOANBURGUNDY, PETERLUX, PHILIPPAGUELDERS, CATHOWARD, ELIZHOW(chained: Edmund Howard is a child of the Norfolk union AND father of Catherine), CONTESSINABARDI, FREDISWABIA, BERENICEHEROD, ALFONSOIXLEON, WARWICK, HENRYLION, EUPHEMIAROSS, BERTRADA, CONSTPORT, JOANVAL(father CHARLESVALOIS existing; Philip VI is the already-present full brother, not re-added to avoid a double parent-edge), LIUTGARDSAX(appended to existing U_liudolf_oda; Otto the Illustrious OTTOILLUS already there is her full brother), RAMONPROV, MARGDENMARK, STEPHENBLOIS, CATHPARR, JOCHEBED(appended to existing Levi/LEVIWIFE union per Numbers 26:59 — Gershon/Kohath/Merari already her brothers there), RENEANJOU, HEDBAB(traditional Popponid descent, flagged), FREDIIIHRE, LOUISESAVOY, FRANCISIIBRITTANY, MARIECLEVES. Sources are Wikipedia/standard genealogies unless a primary text is cited; ancient/biblical years signed BC.
